modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Change TMA phone number on iSD and email.

full_description_text:  
User needs to change TMA phone number.  
It is wrong on iSD and email.  
Work Order created from Request Log.  
No Location on Subject Line.
